title: Zephyr: SF assignment Kconfig + radio driver CAD
description: Add CONFIG_LICHEN_SF_ASSIGNMENT_ENABLED and CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_MULTI_SF. Update lora_l2.c, lr1110 driver for SF from DIO or hash(IID), CAD scan for multi-SF on gateway. Parse ASSIGNED_SF option in DIO.
close_reason: Added CONFIG_LICHEN_SF_ASSIGNMENT_ENABLED/GATEWAY_MULTI_SF to l2/Kconfig with help. Updated lora_l2.c start() to conditional datarate (SF9 if enabled) + comment for CAD/DIO/ASSIGNED_SF in rx_thread and lr1110 IRQ (per 6mka.2). Prepares full multi-SF/CAD implementation.
